layout.spacing: Generous but functional. Page padding p-6 or p-8. Card padding p-5.
layout.radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-lg for buttons/inputs, rounded-full for badges.
layout.grid: Control Room Grid (Dense). Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for Admin overview. Gap 4 or 6.

components.sidebar: Fixed width, solid background (#09090b). Active items get bg-zinc-900 and text-white. Inactive items text-zinc-400 hover:text-white.
components.cards: bg-[#121212] border border-zinc-800/60 shadow-sm. No heavy gradients.
components.badges: Pill shape, 1px border. Use status colors. Font size text-xs font-medium.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800.
components.inputs: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-zinc-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-500 text-sm.
components.dealDetail: Notion-style layout: max-w-4xl mx-auto, large H1, muted metadata below it. Content blocks separated by border-b border-zinc-800. Use standard typography classes for rich text.
components.kanban: Flex container with min-w-full overflow-x-auto. Columns are w-80 shrink-0. Cards inside columns have subtle hover:translate-y-[-2px] transition.

animation: Subtle. transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for hovers.
icons: lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for a sleek technical look.
testing: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case based on their role (e.g., data-testid='submit-brief-button').
instructions_to_main_agent: Use dark mode exclusively. Set main background to #09090b.
Implement sidebar navigation. Use lucide-react icons with strokeWidth={1.5}.
Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Do NOT use Inter or Roboto.
Components should use minimal borders (zinc-800) and no heavy shadows or gradients.
For the BD Dashboard gallery view, use a CSS grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with gap-6.
For the Kanban view, use flex with overflow-x-auto, columns having a fixed width (e.g., w-80).
The Deal Detail page must resemble a Notion page: clean, max-w-4xl, large heading, rich text blocks, distinct divider lines.
Status badges must use the subtle color coding defined in the guidelines.
Ensure the 'Submit Brief' form is heavily streamlined. Use Shadcn inputs/selects but styled to match the dark linear aesthetic.
